products.name: Netflix’s ad ambitions just keep growing

products.name: Instagram hits the copy button again with new disappearing Instants photos
products.summary: Instagram is once again cribbing from competitors like Snapchat and BeReal with a new photo-sharing format it calls "Instants," which are ephemeral photos that you can't edit and that you can only share with your close friends or followers that follow you back

products.name: Mark Zuckerberg announces ‘completely private’ encrypted Meta AI chat
products.summary: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg says its new Incognito Chat is "the first major AI product where there is no log of your conversations stored on servers." Messages in Incognito Chat aren't saved or stored in users' chat history, similar to incognito modes on other AI

products.name: Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents
products.summary: Notion’s new developer platform lets teams connect AI agents, external data sources, and custom code directly into their workspace as the company pushes deeper into agentic productivity software.

products.name: Musk’s xAI is running nearly 50 gas turbines unchecked at its Mississippi data center
products.summary: Gas turbines at xAI's Colossus 2 data center have drawn a lawsuit over the company's use of "mobile" gas turbines as power plants.
